summary: The user is exploring new vegan recipes, particularly for mac and cheese and granola, after discovering a delicious vegan mac and cheese from a new restaurant in town. They expressed interest in trying a cashew-based mac and cheese recipe and sought tips on soaking cashews and blending for a smooth texture, as well as healthy vegan snack ideas to complement their diet.
facts: The user has been getting food delivery from a new vegan restaurant in town.
The user discovered that the restaurant's vegan mac and cheese is amazing.
The user is interested in trying out a cashew-based mac and cheese recipe.
The user has been having a bowl of granola with almond milk every morning.
The user has been experimenting with different non-dairy milks and likes oat milk and cashew milk.
The user is trying to cut down on sugary snacks and has been opting for fruit instead.
The user is excited to try out roasted chickpeas and quinoa bites as healthy vegan snacks.
The user has been meaning to make their own hummus.
